prompt: An ultra-detailed 8K black and white macro portrait of a young man, zoomed in tight on his eye, cheekbone, and lips. Bright sunlight splits into soft, wavy luminous lines rippling across his skin like underwater reflections. The light flows diagonally, wrapping around facial contours in dreamlike patterns, with shadows dissolving into smooth mid-gray tones. Skin rendered in photographic detail: visible pores, faint freckles, slight stubble, natural texture catching glowing light. Lips softly highlighted, eye reflecting fragments of luminous waves. Macro camera framing, razor-thin depth of field: one sharp ridge of illuminated skin, the rest melting into velvety blur. The flowing light gives a surreal, glassy aesthetic grounded in photorealism. Background fades into soft gray gradients. Fine cinematic grain overlays the frame. Intimate, emotionally evocative monochrome portrait.
